description_long: This is a modern, boxy house surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees and shrubs, featuring a predominantly white facade with large windows and blue balcony railings. The structure appears to have two main stories with a flat roof, and the upper floor includes open terraces and visible interior furnishings. The front of the house is accessible via a staircase flanked by ornamental trees, leading to a main entryway that is slightly recessed. The landscaping is lush, with a mix of green and purple-leaved trees providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some large picture windows and sliding glass doors opening onto balconies. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, blue balconies, and lush landscaping of green and purple trees. The flat roof and open terraces highlight its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, blue balconies, and a dense arrangement of purple and green trees.
description_view_1: Rear view with fewer visible balconies, more green trees, and a plainer facade with large windows.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the blue balcony, large windows, and a mix of green and purple trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multiple blue balconies, symmetrical window placement, and a prominent display of purple trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a straight staircase, flanked by ornamental trees, recessed door, and no porch or columns
